periods.name: This Afternoon
periods.detailedForecast: A slight chance of showers and thunderstorms between 3pm and 4pm. Partly sunny, with a high near 85. South southwest wind around 14 mph, with gusts as high as 25 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%.

periods.name: Tonight
periods.shortForecast: Slight Chance Rain Showers then Chance Showers And Thunderstorms
periods.detailedForecast: A slight chance of rain showers between 11pm and 1am, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms between 1am and 3am, then showers and thunderstorms. Mostly cloudy. Low around 51, with temperatures rising to around 68 overnight. West southwest wind around 14 mph, with gusts as high as 25 mph. Chance of precipitation is 90%.

periods.name: Saturday
periods.shortForecast: Showers And Thunderstorms then Chance Showers And Thunderstorms
periods.detailedForecast: Showers and thunderstorms before 9am, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms between 9am and 5pm. Mostly cloudy. High near 65, with temperatures falling to around 57 in the afternoon. West northwest wind 12 to 15 mph, with gusts as high as 25 mph. Chance of precipitation is 90%.
